summary: A Go-based test runner and MCP handler framework heavily augmented by AI-generated validation and extra tests.
concerns: proliferation of auto-generated extra test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository
uncommitted or partially staged changes (2 modified, 1 staged) indicating potential instability
heavy reliance on AI-generated tests may lead to brittle or redundant test coverage
mixing hand-written and auto-generated tests in the same internal packages can cause maintenance confusion
suggestions: consolidate or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents generated test directories to reduce repository noise
commit or stash the pending changes to establish a clean baseline
evaluate the quality and uniqueness of the auto-generated extra tests to eliminate redundancy
document the runner lifecycle hooks added in the recent commit for future contributors
